V1.18.3 Maintenance update for various bug and UX fixes.

V1.18.2 Syqon Parallax integration

V1.18.1 SSSC bug fix, WIMI HR Diagram Updates, Bug fix for make stretch permanent.

V1.18.0
SSSC — Spectrophotometric Standard Star Calibration
Solves your imaging system's true effective throughput R(λ) directly from Gaia XP stellar spectra — no sensor QE curve required. Three stages activate automatically: scalar gains (5+ stars), color-dependent band response (50+), and full per-channel R(λ) via coordinate descent (200+, B-V span ≥ 1.5). Each run refines and seeds the next. Works with any filter set — dedicated astro, OSC Bayer+QE, LP/cut filters. Substantially less sensitive to input curve accuracy than traditional SPCC. Requires the Gaia XP spectral library.

Nebula Flythrough — Cinematic zoom videos from your astrophotos. Composites a stars-only layer over starless using Screen blend, with independent zoom center and rate per layer. Per-layer effects: nebula depth warp (luminance-driven parallax), radial edge stretch, zoom blur, and chromatic aberration — all rampable with zoom velocity. Live scrubber preview before full render. GPU accelerated. SD through 4K export.
